version_description: This is the original version with intro and the full end. Turn the guitar half step down for singing along with Lionel. Hope you like it.
tuning: Eb Ab Db Gb Bb Eb

recommended.song_name: Willy Wonka And The Chocolate Factory - Pure Imagination

content:
Penny Lover

[tab][ch]A[/ch]    [ch]E[/ch]   [ch]F#m[/ch]
Du du du du du[/tab]
[tab][ch]A[/ch]    [ch]E[/ch]    [ch]F#m[/ch]
du du du du du du[/tab]

[Vers 1]
[tab][ch]A[/ch]                [ch]F#m[/ch]
The first time I saw you[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bm[/ch]      [ch]A[/ch]       [ch]G[/ch]
Oh, you looked so fine[/tab]
[tab][ch]A[/ch]            [ch]F#m[/ch]
And I had a feeling[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bm[/ch]  [ch]A[/ch]            [ch]G[/ch]
One day you'd be mine[/tab]

[tab]        [ch]A[/ch]                  [ch]C#7[/ch]       [ch]F#m[/ch]      [ch]E[/ch]  [ch]F#m[/ch]
Honey, you came along and captured my heart[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]Bm[/ch]                            [ch]D[/ch]     [ch]E[/ch]
Now my love is somewhere lost in your kiss[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]Bm[/ch]                        [ch]D[/ch]      [ch]E[/ch]
When I'm all alone it's you that I miss[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]Bm[/ch]                         [ch]D[/ch]              [ch]E[/ch]      [ch]A[/ch]
Girl, a love like yours is hard to resist    Ohh  Ohh    Ohh[/tab]

[Chorus]
[tab][ch]A[/ch]                              [ch]E[/ch]   [ch]F#m[/ch]
Penny lover, my love's on fire[/tab]
[tab]                                  [ch]E[/ch]  [ch]A[/ch]
Penny lover, you're my one desire[/tab]
[tab][ch]A[/ch]                                [ch]E[/ch]   [ch]F#m[/ch]
Tell me baby, could this be true[/tab]
[tab]                                          [ch]E[/ch]  [ch]A[/ch]
That I could need someone like I need you[/tab]

[Vers 2]
[tab][ch]A[/ch]                [ch]F#m[/ch]
Nights, warm and tender[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bm[/ch]         [ch]A[/ch]       [ch]G[/ch]
Lying next to you[/tab]
[tab][ch]A[/ch]             [ch]F#m[/ch]
Girl, I surrender[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bm[/ch]    [ch]A[/ch]        [ch]G[/ch]
What more can I do[/tab]

[tab]        [ch]A[/ch]                  [ch]C#7[/ch]           [ch]F#m[/ch]      [ch]E[/ch]  [ch]F#m[/ch]
I spent all of my life in search of your love[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]Bm[/ch]                            [ch]D[/ch]     [ch]E[/ch]
Now there's one thing I want to say[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]Bm[/ch]                          [ch]D[/ch]      [ch]E[/ch]
Don't you ever take your sweet love away[/tab]
[tab]          [ch]Bm[/ch]                         [ch]D[/ch]              [ch]E[/ch]      [ch]A[/ch]
Girl, I'll do anything just please stay        Ohh  Ohh    Ohh[/tab]


[Break]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]            [ch]E[/ch]
I don't understand it[/tab]
[tab]                [ch]A[/ch]        [ch]E[/ch]  [ch]A[/ch]  [ch]E[/ch]  [ch]D[/ch]
Oh, what's come over me[/tab]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]                 [ch]E[/ch]
But I'm not gonna worry[/tab]
[tab]               [ch]A[/ch]        [ch]E[/ch]   [ch]A[/ch]
Oh, not anymore[/tab]
[tab]             [ch]F#m[/ch]
'Cos when a man's in love[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]E[/ch]          [ch]F#m[/ch]      [ch]E[/ch]  [ch]F#m[/ch]
He's only got one story[/tab]

[tab]              [ch]Bm[/ch]                              [ch]D[/ch]     [ch]E[/ch]
That's why my love is somewhere lost in your kiss[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]Bm[/ch]                               [ch]D[/ch]     [ch]E[/ch]
When I'm lost and alone it's you that I miss[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]Bm[/ch]                            [ch]D[/ch]              [ch]E[/ch]    [ch]A[/ch]
With a love like yours it's hard to resist    Ohh    Ohh  Ohh[/tab]

[Chorus]
[tab][ch]A[/ch]                                 [ch]E[/ch]   [ch]F#m[/ch]
Penny lover, don't you walk on by (don't you walk on by)[/tab]
[tab]                                   [ch]E[/ch]  [ch]A[/ch]
Penny lover, don't you make me cry (don't you make me cry baby)[/tab]
[tab][ch]A[/ch]                                 [ch]E[/ch]   [ch]F#m[/ch]

[tab]                                 [ch]E[/ch]  [ch]A[/ch]

[tab][ch]A[/ch]                                 [ch]E[/ch]   [ch]F#m[/ch]

[tab]                                 [ch]E[/ch]  [ch]A[/ch]
